message:
chore(.gitignore): Add beads viewer local config directory to ignored files

Added .bv/ directory to .gitignore to prevent beads_viewer local
configuration and cache files from being tracked. This directory
contains user-specific settings and temporary data that should not
be committed to the repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -64,3 +64,6 @@ docs/_build/
 check_optax_kwargs.py
 diagnose_jax.py
 artifacts/
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
